title: Cubica Manifest Authoring Common Definitions
description: Shared JSON Schema definitions for authoring manifests. Authoring manifest means the editable source JSON compiled into runtime game/UI manifests.

semanticType.description: Semantic type name used by authoring instances. It explains the node intent and resolves through a local definition.

authoringDefinition.description: Reusable authoring prototype. _semantics is required so people and agents can understand why this definition exists.

_extends.description: Optional inheritance edge to another authoring definition.

_semantics.description: Plain-language meaning of this reusable definition.

definitionsMap.description: Local registry of authoring definitions available to this manifest.

sourceMap.description: Companion file mapping generated runtime JSON Pointers back to authoring sources.
